mapper.select:
SELECT G.maGiaVe, G.giaVe, G.maTuyen, G.maMua, G.ngayBatDau, G.ngayKetThuc, M.tenMua, TD.diemDen, TD.diemKhoiHanh FROM GiaVe G LEFT JOIN mua M on G.maMua = M.maMua LEFT JOIN tuyenduong TD on TD.maTuyen = G.maTuyen where 1 = 1
AND td.diemKhoiHanh LIKE CONCAT('%', #{diemKhoiHanh}, '%')
AND td.diemDen LIKE CONCAT('%', #{diemDen}, '%')
AND M.tenMua LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tenMua}, '%')
ORDER BY G.maGiaVe desc, G.maTuyen desc, G.maMua desc
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT count(*) FROM GiaVe G LEFT JOIN mua M on G.maMua = M.maMua LEFT JOIN tuyenduong TD on TD.maTuyen = G.maTuyen where 1 = 1
AND td.diemKhoiHanh LIKE CONCAT('%', #{diemKhoiHanh}, '%')
AND td.diemDen LIKE CONCAT('%', #{diemDen}, '%')
AND M.tenMua LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tenMua}, '%')

SELECT G.maGiaVe, G.giaVe, G.maTuyen, G.maMua, G.ngayBatDau, G.ngayKetThuc, M.tenMua, TD.diemDen, TD.diemKhoiHanh FROM GiaVe G LEFT JOIN mua M on G.maMua = M.maMua LEFT JOIN tuyenduong TD on TD.maTuyen = G.maTuyen WHERE G.maGiaVe = #{maGiaVe} AND G.maMua = #{maMua} AND G.maTuyen = #{maTuyen}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO GiaVe (giaVe, maTuyen, maMua, ngayBatDau, ngayKetThuc) VALUES (#{giaVe}, #{maTuyen}, #{maMua}, #{ngayBatDau}, #{ngayKetThuc})
mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE seat_numbers AS ( SELECT 1 AS gheNgoi UNION ALL SELECT gheNgoi + 1 FROM seat_numbers WHERE gheNgoi < ( SELECT lx.soGhe FROM Xe x JOIN LoaiXe lx ON x.maLoaiXe = lx.maLoaiXe WHERE x.maXe = 'X001' ) ) SELECT s.gheNgoi FROM seat_numbers s
